blocks.content:
JavaScript can change HTML content and styling dynamically.

## Changing Text Content

```javascript
let element = document.getElementById('message');
element.textContent = 'Hello, World!';  // Change text
```

## Changing Styles

```javascript
element.style.color = 'red';
element.style.fontSize = '20px';
element.style.backgroundColor = 'yellow';
```

Note: CSS properties with hyphens become camelCase in JavaScript:
- `background-color` → `backgroundColor`
- `font-size` → `fontSize`

blocks.title: DOM Manipulation

blocks.content:
## Adding/Removing Classes

```javascript
element.classList.add('active');      // Add a class
element.classList.remove('active');   // Remove a class
element.classList.toggle('active');   // Toggle a class
element.classList.contains('active'); // Check if has class
```

questions.question: How do you change the text of an element?
questions.explanation: Use the textContent property to change an element's text content.
